# Smart Entry - Release Installation Guide

## System Requirements
- Windows 10 or later
- 100 MB free disk space
- No additional installation required (portable app)

## Installation Steps

1. **Extract the ZIP file**
   - Right-click `Smart-Entry-Release.zip`
   - Select "Extract All..." 
   - Choose a folder (e.g., `C:\Program Files\Smart-Entry` or `C:\Users\[YourUsername]\AppData\Local\Smart-Entry`)

2. **Run the application**
   - Navigate to the extracted folder
   - Double-click `smart_entry.exe` to launch the app

## What's Included
- `smart_entry.exe` - Main application executable
- `flutter_windows.dll` - Flutter runtime library (required)
- `data/` - Application assets and resources

## Troubleshooting

**App won't start:**
- Ensure all files are extracted properly
- Check that `flutter_windows.dll` is in the same folder as `smart_entry.exe`
- Make sure Windows Defender or antivirus software isn't blocking the app

**Missing DLL errors:**
- Verify the `flutter_windows.dll` file exists and is not corrupted
- Re-extract the ZIP file to ensure all files are complete

## Features
- Hostel Entry/Exit tracking
- Day Scholar management
- Leave Applications
- Console logging
- Security person login
- Real-time data synchronization

## Notes
- This is a portable application; no installer needed
- You can run it from any location on your computer
- Settings are stored in memory during the session
- Console logs are available in the app's Console section

For support, contact the development team.
